MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-05-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/19/05 IS CONTINUED TO 11/7/05 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED. HON. DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-03-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/27/05 IS CONTINUED TO 9/19/05 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. OKAZAKI; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (D206)
